back: How quickly a CPU can process instructions.
The number of cycles per second a CPU can perform.

front: What is clock speed measured in?
How does clock speed affect CPU performance?
back: A higher clock speed means more instructions can be processed per second.
A core is an independent processing unit inside the CPU.

front: How does the number of cores affect performance?
back: More cores allow multiple tasks to be processed at the same time.
A small amount of very fast memory inside the CPU.

front: How does cache affect CPU performance?
back: Frequently used data is stored in cache so the CPU does not need to access RAM as often, speeding up processing.
